title: Cruvit Plant Identity Registry
description: Data-only canonical identity registry for Cruvit plants. Documents known different-key identity mappings (variant slugs and cross-module keys) and separately records exact same-slug duplicate conflicts for a later merge-safe task. This registry is additive and reviewable. It does NOT rename, merge, or delete plant records, is NOT wired into runtime code, and must NOT be treated as resolving same-slug duplicates. Structure is extensible for a future stable plantId without relying on free-text tags.

registryVersion.description: Semantic version of the registry data content.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this registry file as a whole.

canonicalIdentities.description: Verified different-key identity mappings. Each entry points one or more alias slugs and/or module-specific keys at a single canonical slug. Same-slug duplicates are NOT represented here.

duplicateConflicts.description: Exact same-slug duplicate records. Documented only; not resolved by this registry.

SlugToken.description: Kebab-case identity token (lowercase letters, digits, single hyphens).

ModuleKeys.description: Module-specific identity keys grouped by source. Each source holds a unique-item array of kebab-case keys. Extend by adding new source properties to this schema (no free-text tags).

plantLibrary.description: Keys in the inline index.html PLANT_LIBRARY slug namespace.

careQualityProfiles.description: Keys in the index.html CARE_QUALITY_PROFILES namespace.

LocalizedNameString.description: A non-empty localized plant-name string. Must not be stored as an aliasSlug. Validator additionally rejects whitespace-only values after trim.

LocalizedNameArray.description: Optional bucket of localized name variants for one locale (aliases, historical, transliterations, misspellings, or deprecated).

LocalizedLocaleBlock.description: Identity-grade localized names for a single CRUVIT language code. Display names may still live in the catalog; this block is for canonical identity matching only.

primary.description: Preferred exact-match name forms for this locale. At least one required.

aliases.description: Alternate common names for this locale (not slug tokens).

historical.description: Historical or obsolete common names retained for exact matching.

transliterations.description: Explicit transliterations registered for this locale (never auto-generated at match time).

misspellings.description: Common misspellings accepted only as exact registered variants.

deprecated.description: Deprecated localized forms retained for lookup; must not be used as the sole display name.

script.description: Optional ISO 15924-style four-letter script code (e.g. Hebr, Arab, Latn, Hans).

confidence.description: Editorial confidence in this locale block.

source.description: Provenance / verification source description for this locale block.

needsReview.description: True when this locale block still needs editorial review. When true, the containing canonical identity must also have needsReview:true.

LocalizedNames.description: Optional per-locale identity-grade localized names. Keys must be CRUVIT supported language codes only. Localized names must NOT be stored in aliasSlugs and must never carry a plantId.

ScientificSynonymSource.description: Controlled provenance reference for a scientific synonym. No URLs or free-form citation prose in this foundation.

authority.description: Controlled lowercase source token (e.g. powo, wfo, ipni, tropicos).

recordId.description: Optional stable identifier within the authority (not a URL).

verifiedAt.description: Verification date as YYYY-MM-DD. Calendar validity is enforced by the cross-entry validator.

ScientificSynonymEntry.description: Identity-grade scientific-name synonym (or future nomenclatural alternative). This first version permits relationship=synonym only; future versions may deliberately add orthographic_variant, historical_name, misapplied_name, or deprecated_name. Must never carry a plantId. Must never appear on duplicateConflict records.

name.description: Scientific name string exactly as registered for synonym matching. Distinct from acceptedScientificName.

relationship.description: Nomenclatural relationship to acceptedScientificName. Only 'synonym' is permitted in this foundation version.

confidence.description: Editorial confidence in the synonym relationship. Only high + needsReview=false (on a needsReview=false identity) is eligible for active resolver indexing.

needsReview.description: True when this synonym still needs editorial review. medium/low confidence must set needsReview=true.

sources.description: Non-empty provenance list. Duplicate source references within one synonym entry are invalid.

canonicalSlug.description: The single canonical slug all aliases/module keys should resolve to.

plantId.description: Immutable opaque catalog-level plant identifier. Randomly authored in the central identity registry, never derived from slug, names, or scientific name, never reused, and never changed after assignment.

acceptedScientificName.description: Accepted scientific name, included only where reliable at species level. Omit for genus-level or ambiguous cases. Remains the sole accepted-name field; not moved into scientificSynonyms.

scientificSynonyms.description: Optional scientific-name synonyms for this canonical identity. Omit the property when empty. Never store vernacular/common names or slug aliases here.

aliasSlugs.description: Alternate slugs (same slug namespace as canonicalSlug) that describe the same plant. Duplicate aliases within an entry are rejected.

localizedNames.description: Optional identity-grade localized plant names by CRUVIT language code. Absent by default; not required for registry validity.

needsReview.description: True when the mapping or its scientific name still needs editorial review.

source.description: Which source the observed record came from.

ref.description: Human-readable reference to the record (e.g. file path + approximate line, or key).

scientificName.description: Scientific name exactly as observed on that record (may contain spelling variants).

slug.description: The shared slug used by two or more distinct records.

observedRecords.description: The two or more distinct records sharing the slug.

recommendedCanonicalScientificName.description: Recommended accepted scientific name, when known. Non-binding until the later merge-safe task.

conflictingScientificNamePresent.description: A conflicting scientific name currently present in one of the records (e.g. a misspelling).

needsReview.description: Always true for documented, unresolved conflicts.

resolutionStatus.description: Only 'pending' is valid in this foundation task; conflicts are documented, not resolved.

notes.description: Reviewer notes. Must make clear no correction/merge/deletion happens in this task.
